name: No Pain No Gain
author: Poki
description: No Pain No Gain is a refreshing new take on the classic ragdoll genre. Create elaborate obstacle courses to fling your doll all over the map, or try to get the maximum amount of damage in one go. Too easy? You are able to pick between a large selection of different puzzles where your goal is to transport the ragdoll from point A to B. This naturally doesn’t come without its dangers, but remember: No Pain No Gain! How to play No Pain No Gain? Drag obstacles onto the screen and position them in the best way possible! Who created No Pain No Gain? No Pain No Gain is created by Rike Games. The is their first game on the platform! How can I play No Pain No Gain for free? You can play No Pain No Gain for free on Poki. Can I play No Pain No Gain on mobile devices and desktop? No Pain No Gain can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
